_comment: Quick-action bar above the chat. Copy to harness.json (or set env CC_HARNESS_CONFIG). Each action injects its `cmd` (a slash command or natural-language prompt) into the active claude session. groups[].accent=true uses the accent color. No harness.json -> the whole bar is hidden. Replace the generic examples below with your own project's commands.

actions.label: Plan
actions.cmd: Outline a short plan before you start.
actions.hint: Ask Claude to sketch an approach first

actions.label: Test
actions.cmd: Run the test suite and report any failures.

actions.label: Status
actions.cmd: Run git status and summarize what changed in one line.

actions.label: Explain
actions.cmd: Explain what this project does in 3 bullets.
